PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?nameLabel(COUNT(?person) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  ?person wdt:P27 wd:Q145 .
  ?person wdt:P734 ?name .
  ?name rdfs:label ?nameLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?nameLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?name wdt:P1049 wd:Q229550
  }
}
GROUP BY ?nameLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 10

PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

SELECT ?nameLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .  # Female
  ?person wdt:P27 wd:Q145 .      # UK nationality
  ?person wdt:P734 ?name .       # Given name
  ?name rdfs:label ?nameLabel .  # Name label
  FILTER (lang(?nameLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?name wdt:P1049 wd:Q229550 }  # Exclude Biblical origin
}
GROUP BY ?nameLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 10
